economic_notes: Nation operates Kitsaki Development LP and Kitsaki Management LP (both 99.9% owned, equity method). Kitsaki Group total revenue $60.8M, net income $13.3M. Nation also has proportionate consolidation of Lac La Ronge Regional Waste Management Corp (40%), Lac La Ronge Regional Water Corp (54%), and Woodland Cree Enterprises Inc (33.33%). Multiple retail operations including gas bars, supermarket, lumber store, bingo. COVID-19 impacted operations but total revenues not negatively impacted.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Auditor report signed July 4, 2024 - significantly delayed. Nation is in Saskatchewan. Large consolidated entity with multiple reserves (La Ronge, Little Red River, Grandmother's Bay, Stanley Mission, Hall Lake). Two major business partnerships (Kitsaki Development LP and Kitsaki Management LP) accounted for by modified equity method - combined investment balance $104.9M. Restricted cash split: current $24,689,250 and non-current $3,758,071 totaling $28,447,321. Deferred revenue increased significantly by $16.9M to $58.3M primarily due to ISC COVID support funding. Nation not in compliance with all debt covenants as at March 31, 2022 but management does not expect financing impact. Adoption of PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations expected to have significant impact on liabilities for next period. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNIHB + CMHC + Province of Saskatchewan + Northern Lights School Division.
